name: Pungent French Roll Salad Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 4 large ripe tomatoes, peel seed dice
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the rolls almost through and brush inside well with olive oil.
2. Mix remaining ingredients in a bowl, except mayonnaise.
3. Moisten the mixture with mayonnaise.
4. Fill the rolls with the mixture.
5. Wrap each sandwich individually.
6. Serve on a plate to catch filling as it falls.
7. This makes an excellent picnic dish, taking the place of bread and potato salad.
